signals.headline: Pre-election status:** Analilia **Mejia (Democrat)** is the strong favorite to win this House seat, not Joe Hathaway (Re
signals.raw:
Pre-election status:** Analilia **Mejia (Democrat)** is the strong favorite to win this House seat, not Joe Hathaway (Republican)[2]. Recent polling shows Mejia leading 53% to 36% with 11% undecided[1]. She has substantially outraised Hathaway ($1.1 million vs. $525,000) and the district favors Democrats, having voted for Kamala Harris by 53%-44% in 2024[2].

signals.headline: South Korea BOK Holds Benchmark Rate at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea BOK Holds Benchmark Rate at 2.5% for 7th Straight Month Amid Inflation Above Target and Oil Price Risks | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board unanimously decided on April 10, 2026, to keep its policy rate unchanged at 2.5%, citing inflation at ~2.2% (slightly above the 2% target), rising oil costs from Middle East conflict, won weakness (~1,520/USD), and

signals.headline: I cannot provide the breaking news format you've requested because the election hasn't occurred yet
signals.raw:
I cannot provide the breaking news format you've requested because the election hasn't occurred yet. The **2026 New Jersey's 11th congressional district special election is scheduled for April 16, 2026**[1]—two days from the current date—so no results have been confirmed or announced.
